system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.creatematerialrequest_ver2","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[CreateMaterialRequest_Ver2]
(
	@OrderNumber NVARCHAR(MAX),
	@OrderType NVARCHAR(50),
	@Status NVARCHAR(50)
)
AS

SELECT id, order_number, item_number, 
	SUM(order_qty - ISNULL(test_run_qty, 0)) AS order_qty,
	SUM(ISNULL(test_run_qty, 0)) AS test_run_qty
INTO #ORDERNUMBER
FROM tr_order_detail
WHERE order_number IN (SELECT dbo.TRIM(value) FROM dbo.fn_Split(@OrderNumber, ','))
	--AND order_qty > ship_qty
	AND Finished = 0
	--AND choduyet = '1'
	AND f_cancelled = 'N'
GROUP BY id, order_number, item_number
ORDER BY id

---*** ĐỊNH MỨC NGŨ KIM ***---
IF @OrderType = 'NKI'
BEGIN
	SELECT a.masp
		, A.mavt
		, A.HWforWW
		, A.HWforPacking
		, A.HWforAI
		, SUM(A.soluong * B.order_qty) AS soluong
		, SUM(A.soluong * B.test_run_qty) AS soluong_test_run
		, B.order_qty, b.test_run_qty
		, b.order_number
		, B.id
		, a.ghichu
	INTO #NGUKIM
	FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim A
		RIGHT JOIN #ORDERNUMBER B
		ON A.masp = B.item_number
	WHERE ISNULL(A.mavt,'') <> '' 
	   AND A.hoanthanh = 1
	GROUP BY B.id, b.order_number, a.masp, B.order_qty, b.test_run_qty, A.mavt, A.HWforWW, A.HWforPacking, A.HWforAI, a.ghichu
	ORDER BY B.id

	IF @Status = 'BEFORE'
	BEGIN
		SELECT a.masp, B.nhom, A.mavt, B.mota, B.dvt, B.quycach, B.mausac
			, A.soluong, A.soluong_test_run, A.id, a.order_number, A.order_qty, A.test_run_qty, a.ghichu
		FROM #NGUKIM A
			INNER JOIN tr_material B
			ON A.mavt = ISNULL(B.idxuong, B.mavt)
		WHERE A.HWforWW = 1 AND ISNULL(B.xoa, 'N') = 'N'
		ORDER BY A.id, A.mavt
	END
	ELSE IF @Status = 'AFTER'
	BEGIN
		SELECT a.masp, B.nhom, A.mavt, B.mota, B.dvt, B.quycach, B.mausac
			, A.soluong, A.soluong_test_run, A.id, a.order_number, A.order_qty, A.test_run_qty, a.ghichu
		FROM #NGUKIM A
			INNER JOIN tr_material B
			ON A.mavt = ISNULL(B.idxuong, B.mavt)
		WHERE ISNULL(B.xoa, 'N') = 'N'
			AND A.HWforPacking = 1
		ORDER BY A.id, A.mavt
	END
	ELSE IF @Status = 'AI'
	BEGIN
		SELECT a.masp, B.nhom, A.mavt, B.mota, B.dvt, B.quycach, B.mausac
			, A.soluong, A.soluong_test_run, A.id, a.order_number, A.order_qty, A.test_run_qty, a.ghichu
		FROM #NGUKIM A
			INNER JOIN tr_material B
			ON A.mavt = ISNULL(B.idxuong, B.mavt)
		WHERE ISNULL(B.xoa, 'N') = 'N'
			AND A.HWforAI = 1
		ORDER BY A.id, A.mavt
	END
END

---*** ĐỊNH MỨC BAO BÌ, ĐÓNG GÓI ***---
IF @OrderType = 'DGO'
BEGIN
	SELECT a.masp
		, A.madonggoi AS mavt
		, SUM(CAST(A.soluong AS decimal(18,2)) * B.order_qty) AS soluong
		, SUM(A.soluong * B.test_run_qty) AS soluong_test_run 
		, B.id, b.order_number, B.order_qty, B.test_run_qty, a.ghichu
	INTO #BAOBI
	FROM tr_dinhmuc_donggoi A
		RIGHT JOIN #ORDERNUMBER B
		ON A.masp = B.item_number
	WHERE A.madonggoi IS NOT NULL AND A.hoanthanh = 1
	GROUP BY B.id, a.masp, A.madonggoi, b.order_number, B.order_qty, B.test_run_qty, a.ghichu
	ORDER BY B.id

	SELECT a.masp, B.nhom, A.mavt, B.mota, B.dvt, B.quycach, B.mausac
		, A.soluong, A.soluong_test_run, A.id, a.order_number, A.order_qty, A.test_run_qty, a.ghichu
	FROM #BAOBI A
		INNER JOIN tr_material B
		ON A.mavt = ISNULL(B.idxuong, B.mavt)
	WHERE ISNULL(B.xoa, 'N') = 'N'
	ORDER BY A.id, A.mavt
END

IF @OrderType = 'SON'
BEGIN
	SELECT a.masp
		, A.mact AS mavt
		, SUM((CAST(A.sl_sp AS FLOAT) * CAST(B.order_qty AS FLOAT))) AS soluong
		, SUM(A.sl_sp * B.test_run_qty) AS soluong_test_run
		, B.id, b.order_number, B.order_qty, B.test_run_qty, a.ghichu
		, a.sontrongsanpham
	INTO #SON
	FROM tr_dinhmuc_son A
		RIGHT JOIN #ORDERNUMBER B
		ON A.masp = B.item_number
	WHERE A.mact IS NOT NULL AND A.hoanthanh = 1
	GROUP BY B.id, a.masp, A.mact, b.order_number, B.order_qty, B.test_run_qty, a.ghichu, a.sontrongsanpham

	IF @Status = 'SONTRONG'
	BEGIN
		SELECT a.masp, B.nhom, A.mavt, B.mota, B.dvt, B.quycach, B.mausac
			, A.soluong, A.soluong_test_run, A.id, a.order_number, A.order_qty, A.test_run_qty, a.ghichu
		FROM #SON A
			INNER JOIN tr_material B
			ON A.mavt = ISNULL(B.idxuong, B.mavt)
		WHERE ISNULL(B.xoa, 'N') = 'N' AND A.sontrongsanpham = 1
		ORDER BY A.id, A.mavt
	END
	ELSE IF @Status = 'SONNGOAI'
	BEGIN
		SELECT a.masp, B.nhom, A.mavt, B.mota, B.dvt, B.quycach, B.mausac
			, A.soluong, A.soluong_test_run, A.id, a.order_number, A.order_qty, A.test_run_qty, a.ghichu
		FROM #SON A
			INNER JOIN tr_material B
			ON A.mavt = ISNULL(B.idxuong, B.mavt)
		WHERE ISNULL(B.xoa, 'N') = 'N' AND A.sontrongsanpham = 0
		ORDER BY A.id, A.mavt
	END
END

---*** ĐỊNH MỨC HÀNG TRẮNG ***---
IF @OrderType = 'HTR'
BEGIN
	SELECT a.masp
		, A.mact AS mavt
		, b.order_qty AS soluong
		, B.test_run_qty AS soluong_test_run
		, B.id, b.order_number, b.order_qty, B.test_run_qty, a.ghichu
	INTO #HANGTRANG
	FROM tr_chitiet_hangtrang A
		RIGHT JOIN #ORDERNUMBER B
		ON A.masp = B.item_number
	WHERE A.mact IS NOT NULL
	--GROUP BY a.masp, A.mact

	SELECT a.masp, B.nhom, A.mavt, B.mota, B.dvt, B.quycach, B.mausac
		, A.soluong, A.soluong_test_run, A.id, a.order_number, a.order_qty, A.test_run_qty, a.ghichu
	FROM #HANGTRANG A
		INNER JOIN tr_material B
		ON A.mavt = ISNULL(B.idxuong, B.mavt)
	WHERE ISNULL(B.xoa, 'N') = 'N'
	ORDER BY A.id, A.mavt
END


","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.fn_split","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_order_detail"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
